reasoning: The question asks whether the effective yield of the ICE BofA US Corporate Index will increase. Yields are currently expected to follow a downward trend throughout 2025 and into 2026 as the Fed is anticipated to engage in rate cuts. Therefore, a decrease in yield is more probable than an increase. The empirical base rate provided is 0.422, which strongly serves as a guiding anchor. I will forecast 0.42 given the expected macro environment of easing monetary policy and a singular derived resolution timeline around February 2026.
